name: craftdocs
title: Craft
description: Search Blocks, browse and add to Daily Notes, and manage Spaces in Craft
author: sfkmk

preferences.name: application
preferences.title: Application to search in
preferences.description: Choose which Craft installation to use. If you leave it empty, the extension auto-detects an installed Craft app.

preferences.title: Detailed View
preferences.name: useDetailedView
preferences.label: Use detailed view
preferences.description: Switch the view to display Document content. It is messy!

commands.name: addToDailyNote
commands.title: Add to Daily Note
commands.subtitle: Craft
commands.description: Add content to your Daily Note

preferences.title: Append Position
preferences.name: appendPosition
preferences.description: Choose whether to add content at the beginning or end of the Daily Note

preferences.title: Add Timestamp
preferences.name: addTimestamp
preferences.label: Add timestamp to content
preferences.description: Automatically add current time before your content

preferences.title: Time Format
preferences.name: timeFormat
preferences.description: Custom time format pattern. Examples: HH:mm (14:30), h:mm A (2:30 PM), HH:mm:ss (14:30:45). Patterns: H/HH=24h, h/hh=12h, mm=minutes, ss=seconds, A/a=AM/PM

preferences.title: Prefix
preferences.name: contentPrefix
preferences.description: Text to add after timestamp (if enabled) and before your content

preferences.title: Suffix
preferences.name: contentSuffix
preferences.description: Text to add after your content

commands.name: manageSpaces
commands.title: Manage Spaces
commands.subtitle: Craft
commands.description: Manage your Craft Spaces: rename, enable/disable
